title: Blasting Base/Modded Metal Blocks
description: Allows you to smelt ore blocks into metal blocks using either the furnace or the blast furnace and is compatible with other mods that add ores.
body:
Inspired by similar mods, this mod allows you to smelt ore blocks into metal blocks using either the furnace or the blast furnace and is compatible with other mods that add ores. It includes the base game's ore blocks, but also various integrations. This mod is also hosted on CurseForge.

There are two versions as of now: Ingot and Proportional.

  • The Ingot version has the time and experience set to that of an ingot, so it'll be much faster, but you'll get less exp for doing so.
  • The Proportional version has the time and experience multiplied by nine, so it would take the same amount of time and you'd get the same amount of exp as you would smelting/blasting nine ingots.

There are Forge and Fabric versions as well, each with their own list of integrations, which you can read below. If you have any suggestions for mods to include, please let me know.

Forge/NeoForge Integrations

  • Aberrance: Kyanite, Rudanium
  • Ad Astra: Calorite, Desh, Ostrum
  • Allthemodium: Allthemodium, Unobtainium, Vibranium
  • ATO - All the Ores: Aluminum, Iridium, Lead, Nickel, Osmium, Platinum, Silver, Tin, Uranium, Zinc
  • Astral Dimension: Astranite
  • Beyond Earth: Calorite, Desh, Ostrum, Uranium
  • Blue Skies: Aquite, Charoite, Falsite, Horizonite, Ventium
  • CE's Minerals & More: Antimony, Arsenic, Ytterbium
  • Create: Zinc
  • Electrodynamics: Chromium, Lead, Silver, Tin, Titanium
  • Embers Rekindled: Lead, Silver
  • Endorium: Tungsten
  • Enlightend: Bismuth, Irradium
  • Forest X Reborn: Silver
  • Galosphere: Silver
  • Gedrite Mod: Gedrite
  • Immersive Engineering: Aluminum, Lead, Nickel, Silver, Uranium
  • Immersive Ores: Enderium, Vibranium, Vulpus
  • Liroth: Revamped: Lirothian Cobalt
  • Malum: Soulstone
  • Many More Ores: Askium, Chathil, Eskial, Gaspium, Hocralt, Poflese, Scalium, Tobrine, Vupline
  • Megalo's Metallurgy: Aluminum, Antimony, Arsenic, Barium, Beryllium, Bismuth, Cadmium, Caesium, Calcium, Chromium, Cinnabar, Cobalt, Gallium, Germanium, Hafnium, Indium, Iridium, Lead, Lithium, Magnesium, Manganese, Molybdenum, Nickel, Niobium, Osmium, Palladium, Phosphorus, Platinum, Potassium, Rhenium, Rhodium, Rubidium, Ruthenium, Scandium, Selenium, Silicon, Silver, Sodium, Strontium, Tantalum, Technetium, Tellurium, Thallium, Tin, Titanium, Tungsten, Vanadium, Yttrium, Zinc, Zirconium
  • Mekanism: Lead, Osmium, Tin, Uranium
  • Minecraft: Copper, Gold, Iron
  • Minecraft Content Expansion: Ascabit, Tin, Titanium, Zinc
  • mOres Reloaded: Cobalt, Silver, Tin
  • Nature Arise: Aluminum
  • Occultism: Iesnium, Silver
  • Ores and Metals: Adamantite, Bronze, Mithril, Runite, Steel, Tin
  • Pigsteel [Forge]: Pigsteel Chunk
  • Teqium: Teqium
  • The Undergarden: Cloggrum, Froststeel
  • Thermal Foundation: Lead, Nickel, Silver, Tin
  • Useless Mod: Useless, Super Useless

Fabric/Quilt Integrations

  • Ad Astra: Calorite, Desh, Ostrum
  • Bewitchment: Silver
  • Create Fabric: Zinc
  • Endorium: Tungsten
  • Galosphere: Silver
  • Gedrite Mod: Gedrite
  • Industrial Revolution: Lead, Silver, Tin, Tungsten
  • Immersive Ores: Enderium, Vibranium, Vulpus
  • Liroth: Revamped: Lirothian Cobalt
  • Modern Industrialization: Antimony, Iridium, Lead, Nickel, Platinum, Silver, Tin, Titanium, Tungsten, Uranium
  • Many More Ores: Askium, Chathil, Eskial, Gaspium, Hocralt, Poflese, Scalium, Tobrine, Vupline
  • Minecraft: Copper, Gold, Iron
  • Mythic Metals: Adamantite, Aquarium, Banglum, Carmot, Kyber, Manganese, Midas Gold, Mythril, Orichalcum, Osmium, Palladium, Platinum, Prometheum, Quadrillum, Runite, Silver, Stormyx, Tin
  • Nature Arise: Aluminum
  • Ores and Metals: Adamantite, Bronze, Mithril, Runite, Steel, Tin
  • Pigsteel [Fabric]: Pigsteel Chunk
  • Rethinking Ores: Platinum, Titanium
  • Tech Reborn: Iridium, Lead, Silver, Tin, Tungsten
  • Beneath the Wetlands: Bog Iron

Credits

I want to thank MCreator and its team. I used the program since I wasn't familiar with how to mod Minecraft or use Java at all, and it made it super easy. If you have a mod idea that you want to bring to life, I highly recommend it.
